# gastown_hq (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Filesystem path where the Gas Town HQ will be installed.

### Optional

- `git` (Boolean) Whether to initialize git in the HQ directory. Defaults to true.
- `no_beads` (Boolean) Whether to skip beads initialization. Defaults to false.
- `owner_email` (String) Email address of the HQ owner.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the HQ resource. Same as the path.
- `name` (String) The name of the town (read from mayor/town.json).
